title: Online reservation
successDesc: Thank you! Your reservation request has been received.
successDescNamed: Thank you, {{name}}! Your reservation request has been received.
authDesc: Online reservations are available only to registered guests. Enter your phone or email to continue.
notFoundGuest: We couldn't find your details in our records. Please register first.

genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

notice: This is a reservation request. The restaurant will contact you to confirm.
